title: FP Estimator product data file
description: Schema for each data/<app-name>/<dataFile>.json referenced from metadata.json's projectConfig.products. Documentation/IDE-validation aid only — not enforced at runtime.

id.description: Optional. Used as a fallback label if 'shortCode' is absent in metadata.json's product entry.

status.description: Optional product-level status key (see metadata.json's statusDefinitions). Falls back to 'completed'.

features.description: Optional. Omit or [] renders the product with 0 features and 0 FP — not an error.

capabilities.description: Optional. Omit or [] renders the feature with 0 capabilities and 0 FP.

type.description: FP type key — must match a key under metadata.json's fpConfig.fpWeights (e.g. 'EI', 'EO', 'EQ', 'ILF', 'EIF') or this capability contributes 0 FP silently.

complexity.description: Low/Average/High — must match a nested key under fpWeights[type] or this capability contributes 0 FP silently.

status.description: Optional. Falls back to 'completed' for both status-legend filtering and status-count tallies.
